svg.title: MyAV three-layer antivirus architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing interface, engine, and storage layers with all current project files

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the CLI work in antivirus.py?')
sendPrompt('How does scan_file route between layers?')
sendPrompt('How does Layer 1 local signature matching work?')
sendPrompt('How does Layer 3 heuristic detection work?')
sendPrompt('What is vt_cache.json and why is it needed?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the quarantine folder?')
